A.title: Cinematic Lower-Third Reveal
A.svg:
<svg viewBox="0 0 480 270">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="a_auroraEdge" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#2bd4d4"/>
      <stop offset="0.4" stop-color="#7de4d4"/>
      <stop offset="0.7" stop-color="#9d8cff"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#7a5cff"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="a_glass" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#141826" stop-opacity="0.86"/>
      <stop offset="0.5" stop-color="#0a0c12" stop-opacity="0.84"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#05060a" stop-opacity="0.82"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="a_glassSheen" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#ffffff" stop-opacity="0.16"/>
      <stop offset="0.18" stop-color="#ffffff" stop-opacity="0.04"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#ffffff" stop-opacity="0"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <radialGradient id="a_avatarFill" cx="0.4" cy="0.32" r="0.85">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#aef3ea"/>
      <stop offset="0.45" stop-color="#7de4d4"/>
      <stop offset="0.8" stop-color="#9d8cff"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#5b46c9"/>
    </radialGradient>
    <linearGradient id="a_ring" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#aef3ea"/>
      <stop offset="0.45" stop-color="#2bd4d4"/>
      <stop offset="0.75" stop-color="#9d8cff"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#ffd24a"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="a_underline" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="0">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#2bd4d4" stop-opacity="0"/>
      <stop offset="0.12" stop-color="#2bd4d4"/>
      <stop offset="0.55" stop-color="#7de4d4"/>
      <stop offset="0.8" stop-color="#9d8cff"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#9d8cff" stop-opacity="0"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="a_gold" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#ffe79a"/>
      <stop offset="0.5" stop-color="#ffd24a"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#e0a417"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="a_trail" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="0">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#7de4d4" stop-opacity="0"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#aef3ea" stop-opacity="0.9"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <radialGradient id="a_avGlow" cx="0.5" cy="0.5" r="0.5">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#7de4d4" stop-opacity="0.55"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#7de4d4" stop-opacity="0"/>
    </radialGradient>
    <filter id="a_glow" x="-60%" y="-60%" width="220%" height="220%">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="3.4" result="b"/>
      <feMerge><feMergeNode in="b"/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge>
    </filter>
    <filter id="a_softShadow" x="-30%" y="-40%" width="160%" height="200%">
      <feDropShadow dx="0" dy="4" stdDeviation="6" flood-color="#000000" flood-opacity="0.55"/>
    </filter>
    <filter id="a_textGlow" x="-30%" y="-60%" width="160%" height="240%">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="1.1" result="b"/>
      <feMerge><feMergeNode in="b"/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge>
    </filter>
    <clipPath id="a_avatarClip"><circle cx="78" cy="186" r="34"/></clipPath>
    <clipPath id="a_bannerClip"><rect x="20" y="150" width="440" height="74" rx="16"/></clipPath>
  </defs>

  <!-- soft partial wash so it reads as overlay, never full opaque -->
  <rect x="0" y="138" width="480" height="132" fill="#0a0c12" opacity="0.10"/>

  <!-- motion speed-lines implying slide-in -->
  <g opacity="0.7">
    <rect x="372" y="166" width="74" height="2.4" rx="1.2" fill="url(#a_trail)"/>
    <rect x="392" y="182" width="58" height="2" rx="1" fill="url(#a_trail)" opacity="0.8"/>
    <rect x="384" y="198" width="66" height="2.2" rx="1.1" fill="url(#a_trail)" opacity="0.65"/>
    <rect x="402" y="212" width="44" height="1.8" rx="0.9" fill="url(#a_trail)" opacity="0.5"/>
  </g>

  <!-- banner glow trail on leading edge -->
  <rect x="14" y="150" width="14" height="74" rx="7" fill="#7de4d4" opacity="0.30" filter="url(#a_glow)"/>

  <!-- banner body -->
  <g filter="url(#a_softShadow)">
    <rect x="20" y="150" width="440" height="74" rx="16" fill="url(#a_auroraEdge)"/>
    <rect x="22.5" y="152.5" width="435" height="69" rx="14" fill="url(#a_glass)"/>
  </g>
  <!-- glass sheen -->
  <g clip-path="url(#a_bannerClip)">
    <rect x="22.5" y="152.5" width="435" height="30" fill="url(#a_glassSheen)"/>
    <rect x="20" y="150" width="3" height="74" fill="#aef3ea" opacity="0.5"/>
  </g>

  <!-- avatar glow halo -->
  <circle cx="78" cy="186" r="46" fill="url(#a_avGlow)"/>

  <!-- avatar ring -->
  <circle cx="78" cy="186" r="39" fill="none" stroke="url(#a_ring)" stroke-width="4.5" filter="url(#a_glow)"/>
  <circle cx="78" cy="186" r="35.5" fill="none" stroke="#0a0c12" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.6"/>

  <!-- avatar placeholder face -->
  <g clip-path="url(#a_avatarClip)">
    <circle cx="78" cy="186" r="34" fill="url(#a_avatarFill)"/>
    <circle cx="78" cy="178" r="11" fill="#0a0c12" opacity="0.82"/>
    <path d="M58 214 a20 16 0 0 1 40 0 Z" fill="#0a0c12" opacity="0.82"/>
    <circle cx="68" cy="176" r="2.4" fill="#aef3ea"/>
    <circle cx="79" cy="176" r="2.4" fill="#aef3ea"/>
    <path d="M68 184 q5.5 5 13 0" fill="none" stroke="#aef3ea" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </g>

  <!-- tier badge cluster near avatar -->
  <g filter="url(#a_textGlow)">
    <!-- gold sub star -->
    <g transform="translate(54,150)">
      <circle r="10.5" fill="url(#a_gold)" stroke="#fff7df" stroke-width="1"/>
      <path d="M0 -6 1.8 -1.8 6 -1.8 2.6 1 3.8 5.4 0 2.8 -3.8 5.4 -2.6 1 -6 -1.8 -1.8 -1.8 Z" fill="#5a3a00"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Patreon P -->
    <g transform="translate(80,144)">
      <circle r="10" fill="#9d8cff" stroke="#cfc6ff" stroke-width="1"/>
      <circle cx="2.5" cy="-1" r="4.4" fill="#0a0c12"/>
      <rect x="-4.5" y="-6" width="2.6" height="13" rx="1" fill="#0a0c12"/>
    </g>
    <!-- cheer/bits gem -->
    <g transform="translate(106,150)">
      <circle r="10" fill="#2bd4d4" stroke="#aef3ea" stroke-width="1"/>
      <path d="M0 -6 5 -1 0 6 -5 -1 Z" fill="#0a3b3b"/>
      <path d="M0 -6 5 -1 0 0 Z" fill="#7de4d4"/>
      <path d="M0 -6 -5 -1 0 0 Z" fill="#aef3ea"/>
    </g>
  </g>

  <!-- eyebrow label -->
  <g>
    <rect x="138" y="160" width="11" height="11" rx="2.5" fill="url(#a_gold)"/>
    <path d="M141 165.5 l1.8 1.8 3.2 -3.6" fill="none" stroke="#5a3a00" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
    <text x="155" y="169.5" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="700" letter-spacing="3.2" fill="#7de4d4">NEW FOLLOWER</text>
  </g>

  <!-- headline -->
  <text x="138" y="198" font-family="Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="23" font-weight="800" fill="#ffffff" filter="url(#a_textGlow)">Welcome, <tspan fill="#ffd24a">@aurora_fan</tspan>!</text>

  <!-- swept aurora underline -->
  <rect x="138" y="206" width="300" height="3" rx="1.5" fill="url(#a_underline)" filter="url(#a_glow)"/>
  <circle cx="438" cy="207.5" r="3" fill="#aef3ea" filter="url(#a_glow)"/>

  <!-- small kinetic sparkles -->
  <g fill="#aef3ea" filter="url(#a_glow)">
    <path d="M428 168 l1.4 3 3 1.4 -3 1.4 -1.4 3 -1.4 -3 -3 -1.4 3 -1.4 Z" opacity="0.9"/>
    <circle cx="120" cy="178" r="1.6" opacity="0.8"/>
    <circle cx="452" cy="200" r="1.4" opacity="0.7"/>
  </g>
</svg>
A.desc: A glassy aurora-edged lower-third banner slid in with avatar ring, tier badges, and a swept underline at peak.

B.title: Aurora Wash + Particle Confetti
B.svg:
<svg viewBox="0 0 480 270" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

B.desc: Peak follow-celebration: translucent teal-violet aurora wash, raining aurora confetti, center avatar bursting through an expanding shockwave ring with radiating sparks.

<svg viewBox="0 0 480 270" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

<svg viewBox="0 0 480 270">
  <defs>

      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#0a0c12" stop-opacity="0.88"/>

      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#ffffff" stop-opacity="0.16"/>
      <stop offset="0.18" stop-color="#ffffff" stop-opacity="0.04"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#ffffff" stop-opacity="0"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="f_accent" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">

      <stop offset="0.5" stop-color="#2bd4d4"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#9d8cff"/>

    <linearGradient id="f_ring" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">

      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#9d8cff"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <radialGradient id="f_av" cx="0.4" cy="0.32" r="0.85">

      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#3a2f7a"/>
    </radialGradient>
    <radialGradient id="f_softlight" cx="0.5" cy="0.5" r="0.5">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#2bd4d4" stop-opacity="0.22"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#2bd4d4" stop-opacity="0"/>
    </radialGradient>
    <linearGradient id="f_check" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#aef3ea"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#2bd4d4"/>

    <radialGradient id="f_gem" cx="0.4" cy="0.3" r="0.8">

  </g>
  <g clip-path="url(#f_cardclip)">

    <rect x="248" y="40" width="2.4" height="38" rx="1.2" fill="url(#f_accent)" opacity="0.95"/>
  </g>
  <!-- crisp glass border -->
  <rect x="244.6" y="28.6" width="214.8" height="60.8" rx="17.4" fill="none" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-opacity="0.14" stroke-width="1.1"/>
  <rect x="245.6" y="29.6" width="212.8" height="58.8" rx="16.4" fill="none" stroke="#000000" stroke-opacity="0.25" stroke-width="0.8"/>

  <!-- avatar glow ring -->

  <circle cx="304" cy="58" r="23.4" fill="none" stroke="#0a0c12" stroke-opacity="0.5" stroke-width="1"/>
  <!-- avatar fill + face placeholder -->

    <ellipse cx="304" cy="46" rx="18" ry="16" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.07"/>

  <!-- live aurora dot accent (top-right of avatar ring) -->

      <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="6.6" fill="url(#f_gold)"/>
      <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="6.6" fill="none" stroke="#7a5a10" stroke-opacity="0.5" stroke-width="0.6"/>
      <path d="M0 -3.6 L1.1 -1.1 L3.8 -0.8 L1.8 1 L2.4 3.7 L0 2.3 L-2.4 3.7 L-1.8 1 L-3.8 -0.8 L-1.1 -1.1 Z" fill="#5a3e08"/>
    </g>
    <!-- patreon P -->
    <g transform="translate(16 0)">
      <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="6.6" fill="#ff5a4a"/>
      <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="6.6" fill="none" stroke="#a82e22" stroke-opacity="0.5" stroke-width="0.6"/>
      <text x="0" y="3.3" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Georgia, serif" font-size="9.5" font-weight="700" fill="#ffffff">P</text>
    </g>
    <!-- cheer bits gem -->
    <g transform="translate(32 0)">
      <path d="M0 -6.4 L5.4 -2.2 L3.4 5.4 L-3.4 5.4 L-5.4 -2.2 Z" fill="url(#f_gem)"/>
      <path d="M0 -6.4 L0 5.4 M-5.4 -2.2 L5.4 -2.2" stroke="#0a0c12" stroke-opacity="0.35" stroke-width="0.7"/>
      <path d="M0 -6.4 L5.4 -2.2 L3.4 5.4 Z" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.16"/>
    </g>
  </g>

  <!-- soft bottom aurora accent line under text -->
  <rect x="340" y="74" width="86" height="1.4" rx="0.7" fill="url(#f_accent)" opacity="0.5"/>
</svg>
